issues.title: P1 Deploy gate: assert Render live deploy commit matches expected revision
issues.description:
## Problem

`verify:render` proves service health, but does not assert that the live deploy corresponds to the expected code revision (for example local `HEAD` / pushed commit). This can hide stale-deploy situations.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `verify:render` captures deploy commit id from Render and expected commit id from git context.
- [ ] Gate fails when commit ids do not match, with machine-parseable diagnostics.
- [ ] Evidence payload includes deploy id, expected commit, and actual commit.

issues.title: P1 Observability: automate post-deploy Render log audit in verify:render
issues.description:
## Problem

Phase 1 deploy validation currently checks smoke only. Build/runtime warning and error signals are not automatically audited in the same gate.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `verify:render` (or companion script) pulls a bounded post-deploy log window from Render API.
- [ ] Gate reports warn/error counts and fails on configurable threshold.
- [ ] Output includes structured summary and saved evidence artifact path.

issues.title: P1 Deploy gate: run non-destructive scheduling/walk-in scenario on deployed URL
issues.description:
## Problem

Post-deploy verification runs smoke, but does not run the Phase 1 scheduling/walk-in scenario automatically in the deploy gate.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Deploy gate executes `scenario:scheduling-walkin` against deployed `APP_BASE_URL` in non-destructive mode.
- [ ] Scenario failure fails the deploy gate.
- [ ] Gate output distinguishes smoke vs scenario step status in machine-parseable JSON.
